jp.title: キーウやウクライナ各地で市民がフェドロウ国防相解任に抗議集会開催

jp.title: ロシアとウクライナ、黒海・アゾフ海で船舶攻撃 小麦価格急騰
jp.description: ウクライナとロシアは１６日、黒海とアゾフ海の船舶に対してミサイルとドローン（無人機）による攻撃を実施し、戦闘が激化した。両海域は穀物輸出に極めて重要な地域で、攻撃を受けて世界の小麦​価格が上昇している。

jp.title: ヘグセス氏、米軍でテストステロン欠乏症の検査を開始すると発言
jp.description: 米国防総省のヘグセス長官は15日、30歳以上の軍人を対象に、毎年の健康診断の一環としてテストステロン欠乏症の検査を実施すると発表した。テストステロン値が低い兵士には、任意でホルモン補充療法が提供されるという。

jp.title: 日産、新型「エルグランド」発売記念イベントを開催 なぜ走りにこだわるのか、なぜe-4ORCE仕様だけの設定なのか？
jp.description: 日産自動車は7月16日、同日に発売した新型「エルグランド」の発売記念イベントを日産グローバル本社ギャラリー（神奈川県横浜市西区）で開催した。

world.title: Brampton man murdered, body dumped in Hamilton: police
world.description: The body of a man found in Stoney Creek on Wednesday has been identified as belonging to a Brampton man, and his death has been deemed a homicide.

world.title: ‘I'm still here, don’t remarry': Documenting the past through 'simple' remittance letters
world.description: A surprise Chinese box-office hit that has been screening in Auckland this month has documented the rich history of remittance letters that migrants once sent to their families back home.

world.title: Country music star Luke Combs headlines Slane this weekend - here's all you need to know
world.description: Combs will be joined by a number of special guests, including Irish band The Script.

world.title: Netflix Q2 Earnings Results In-Line With Expectations, Stock Drops
world.description: Netflix reported earnings for the second quarter of 2026 as investors remain concerned over a slowdown in viewer engagement.

world.title: Texas AG: Walmart to pay $13M settlement over Spark driver pay, tips
world.description: Settlement repays affected Texans and requires Walmart to provide clearer, more accurate compensation information for Spark drivers going forward.

world.title: SNL Star Chloe Fineman Is Leaving the Show After 7 Seasons
world.description: 'SNL' star Chloe Fineman is leaving the show after seven seasons, the star announced.

world.title: 2nd ODI: Joe Root's unbeaten 99 helps England down India, level series 1-1
world.description: Joe Root anchored England's chase with an unbeaten 99 as the hosts defeated India by four wickets in the second ODI to level the three-match series in Cardiff on Thursday.

world.title: 570-Megapixel Dark Energy Camera Photographs Van Gogh-Esque 'Starry Night'
world.description: NOIRLab's Dark Energy Camera (DECam) turned its 570-megapixel camera array toward a local stellar nursery.
